inputs.label: Gear 1 Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the first driving gear in the gear train

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the first driving gear in the gear train
businessContext_i18n.tr: Dişli takımındaki birinci tahrik dişlisinin diş sayısı

inputs.label: Gear 2 Teeth

inputs.label: Gear 3 Teeth
inputs.businessContext: Number of teeth on the second driving gear (if any, set to 1 for no gear)

businessContext_i18n.en: Number of teeth on the second driving gear (if any, set to 1 for no gear)
businessContext_i18n.tr: Varsa ikinci tahrik dişlisinin diş sayısı (yoksa 1 olarak ayarlayın)
businessContext_i18n.de: Anzahl der Zähne des zweiten treibenden Zahnrads (falls vorhanden, auf 1 setzen, wenn kein Zahnrad)
